decisions.title: Engineering Memory accepts GitHub webhook input
decisions.summary: Hermes can generate engineering memory from GitHub webhook repository, branch, commit, author, and changed-file context.

lessons_learned: Repo-aware engineering memory is more useful than generic repository scanning.
Webhook payloads provide reliable commit, author, branch, and changed-file context.
open_items: Improve event archive to store full webhook payload.
Add failure alerting for memory automation.
Add deduplication guard for repeated memory commits.
tomorrow_objective: Use repo-aware engineering memory as the default source for GitHub-triggered automation.
